```python
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.exceptions import BusinessConflictError, NotFoundError
from app.repositories.entries_points_repo import EntriesPointsRepository
from app.repositories.points_rule_repo import PointsRuleRepository
from app.repositories.season_repo import SeasonRepository
from app.schemas.points_rule import PointsRuleCreate, PointsRuleUpdate


class PointsRuleService:
    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession):
        self.db = db
        self.repo = PointsRuleRepository(db)
        self.season_repo = SeasonRepository(db)
        self.entries_repo = EntriesPointsRepository(db)

    async def list_rules(self, season_id: int | None = None, rule_type: str | None = None):
        if season_id is None:
            active = await self.season_repo.get_active()
            if active:
                season_id = active.id
        return await self.repo.list(season_id, rule_type)

    async def create_rule(self, data: PointsRuleCreate):
        active = await self.season_repo.get_active()
        if not active:
            raise BusinessConflictError(
                detail="无激活赛季，无法创建规则", code="TOURNAMENT_NO_ACTIVE_SEASON"
            )

        duplicate = await self.repo.find_duplicate(
            season_id=active.id,
            rule_type=data.rule_type,
            event_level=data.event_level,
            group_name=data.group_name,
            result_type=data.result_type,
        )
        if duplicate:
            raise BusinessConflictError(detail="该规则组合已存在", code="RULE_DUPLICATE")

        rule = await self.repo.create(season_id=active.id, **data.model_dump())
        await self.db.commit()
        return rule

    async def update_rule(self, rule_id: int, data: PointsRuleUpdate):
        rule = await self.repo.get_by_id(rule_id)
        if not rule:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="规则不存在", code="RULE_NOT_FOUND")

        update_data = data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)
        rule = await self.repo.update(rule, **update_data)
        await self.db.commit()
        return rule

    async def delete_rule(self, rule_id: int):
        rule = await self.repo.get_by_id(rule_id)
        if not rule:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="规则不存在", code="RULE_NOT_FOUND")

        await self.repo.delete(rule)
        await self.db.commit()

```

File created successfully at: /Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/backend/app/services/points_rule_service.py
```

from app.core.database import get_db

from app.schemas.auth import LoginRequest, LoginResponse

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.deps import get_current_user
from app.schemas.season import SeasonCreate, SeasonUpdate
from app.services.season_service import SeasonService

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/v1/admin/seasons", tags=["seasons"])


@router.get("", response_model=None)
async def list_seasons(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = SeasonService(db)
    seasons, total = await service.list_seasons(page, page_size)
    return {
        "data": [
            {
                "id": s.id,
                "name": s.name,
                "start_date": str(s.start_date),
                "end_date": str(s.end_date),
                "status": s.status,
                "created_at": s.created_at.isoformat() if s.created_at else None,
            }
            for s in seasons
        ],
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size,
    }


@router.post("", response_model=None, status_code=201)
async def create_season(
    body: SeasonCreate,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = SeasonService(db)
    season = await service.create_season(body)
    return {
        "data": {
            "id": season.id,
            "name": season.name,
            "start_date": str(season.start_date),
            "end_date": str(season.end_date),
            "status": season.status,
            "created_at": season.created_at.isoformat() if season.created_at else None,
        },
        "message": "ok",
    }


@router.put("/{season_id}", response_model=None)
async def update_season(
    season_id: int,
    body: SeasonUpdate,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = SeasonService(db)
    season = await service.update_season(season_id, body)
    return {
        "data": {
            "id": season.id,
            "name": season.name,
            "start_date": str(season.start_date),
            "end_date": str(season.end_date),
            "status": season.status,
            "created_at": season.created_at.isoformat() if season.created_at else None,
        },
        "message": "ok",
    }


@router.post("/{season_id}/activate", response_model=None)
async def activate_season(
    season_id: int,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = SeasonService(db)
    season = await service.activate_season(season_id)
    return {
        "data": {
            "id": season.id,
            "name": season.name,
            "start_date": str(season.start_date),
            "end_date": str(season.end_date),
            "status": season.status,
        },
        "message": "ok",
    }


@router.post("/{season_id}/close", response_model=None)
async def close_season(
    season_id: int,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = SeasonService(db)
    season = await service.close_season(season_id)
    return {
        "data": {
            "id": season.id,
            "name": season.name,
            "start_date": str(season.start_date),
            "end_date": str(season.end_date),
            "status": season.status,
        },
        "message": "ok",
    }

```

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.deps import get_current_user
from app.schemas.player import PlayerCreate, PlayerUpdate
from app.services.player_service import PlayerService

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/v1/admin/players", tags=["players"])


@router.get("", response_model=None)
async def list_players(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: str | None = None,
    department: str | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = PlayerService(db)
    players, total = await service.list_players(page, page_size, search, department)
    return {
        "data": [
            {
                "id": p.id,
                "full_name": p.full_name,
                "gender": p.gender,
                "birth_date": str(p.birth_date) if p.birth_date else None,
                "department": p.department,
                "status": p.status,
                "created_at": p.created_at.isoformat() if p.created_at else None,
            }
            for p in players
        ],
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size,
    }


@router.post("", response_model=None, status_code=201)
async def create_player(
    body: PlayerCreate,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = PlayerService(db)
    player = await service.create_player(body)
    return {
        "data": {
            "id": player.id,
            "full_name": player.full_name,
            "gender": player.gender,
            "birth_date": str(player.birth_date) if player.birth_date else None,
            "department": player.department,
            "status": player.status,
            "created_at": player.created_at.isoformat() if player.created_at else None,
        },
        "message": "ok",
    }


@router.get("/{player_id}", response_model=None)
async def get_player(
    player_id: int,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query

from app.core.database import get_db

@router.get("", response_model=None)
async def list_tournaments(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    status: str | None = None,
    season_id: int | None = None,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _=Depends(get_current_user),
):
    service = TournamentService(db)
    tournaments, total = await service.list_tournaments(page, page_size, status, season_id)
    return {
        "data": [
            {
                "id": t.id,
                "season_id": t.season_id,
                "name": t.name,
                "event_category": t.event_category,
                "level": t.level,
                "group_name": t.group_name,

                "location": t.location,
                "status": t.status,
                "created_at": t.created_at.isoformat() if t.created_at else None,
            }
            for t in tournaments
        ],
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "page_size": page_size,
    }

```python
import os
from pathlib import Path

from fastapi import UploadFile
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.config import settings
from app.core.exceptions import BusinessConflictError, NotFoundError
from app.models.event_result import EventResult
from app.models.event_result_player import EventResultPlayer
from app.repositories.event_result_repo import EventResultRepository
from app.repositories.player_repo import PlayerRepository
from app.repositories.tournament_repo import TournamentRepository
from app.repositories.upload_repo import UploadRepository


class UploadService:
    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession):
        self.db = db
        self.repo = UploadRepository(db)
        self.tournament_repo = TournamentRepository(db)
        self.player_repo = PlayerRepository(db)
        self.event_result_repo = EventResultRepository(db)

    async def create_upload(self, file: UploadFile, tournament_id: int, user_id: int):
        tournament = await self.tournament_repo.get_by_id(tournament_id)
        if not tournament:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="赛事不存在", code="TOURNAMENT_NOT_FOUND")

        upload_dir = Path(settings.UPLOAD_DIR)
        upload_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        import uuid
        ext = Path(file.filename).suffix
        stored_name = f"{uuid.uuid4().hex}{ext}"
        file_path = upload_dir / stored_name

        content = await file.read()
        with open(file_path, "wb") as f:
            f.write(content)

        upload = await self.repo.create(
            tournament_id=tournament_id,
            filename=file.filename,
            file_path=str(file_path),
            uploaded_by=user_id,
        )
        await self.db.commit()

        # In MVP, parse synchronously for simplicity (no ARQ worker required for basic flow)
        await self._parse_excel(upload)
        return upload

    async def get_upload(self, upload_id: int):
        upload = await self.repo.get_by_id(upload_id)
        if not upload:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="上传记录不存在", code="UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND")
        return upload

    async def get_preview(self, upload_id: int):
        upload = await self.repo.get_by_id(upload_id)
        if not upload:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="上传记录不存在", code="UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND")
        if upload.status not in ("parsed", "imported"):
            raise BusinessConflictError(
                detail="上传尚未解析完成", code="UPLOAD_STATUS_INVALID"
            )
        return upload.preview_data or []

    async def confirm_import(self, upload_id: int, confirmed_rows: list[int], ignored_rows: list[int]):
        upload = await self.repo.get_by_id(upload_id)
        if not upload:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="上传记录不存在", code="UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND")
        if upload.status != "parsed":
            raise BusinessConflictError(
                detail="仅 parsed 状态可确认导入", code="UPLOAD_STATUS_INVALID"
            )

        preview = upload.preview_data or []
        imported_count = 0

        for row in preview:
            if row["row_number"] not in confirmed_rows:
                continue
            if row.get("row_status") == "error":
                continue

            event_result = await self.event_result_repo.create(
                tournament_id=upload.tournament_id,
                result_type=row.get("result_type", "participant"),
                is_cross_province=row.get("is_cross_province", False),
                is_cross_border=row.get("is_cross_border", False),
                upload_id=upload.id,
            )

            if row.get("player1_id"):
                await self.event_result_repo.create_player_link(event_result.id, row["player1_id"])
            if row.get("player2_id"):
                await self.event_result_repo.create_player_link(event_result.id, row["player2_id"])

            imported_count += 1

        # Update tournament status to completed
        tournament = await self.tournament_repo.get_by_id(upload.tournament_id)
        if tournament and tournament.status == "draft":
            tournament.status = "completed"

        upload.status = "imported"
        await self.db.commit()

        return {
            "upload_id": upload.id,
            "status": "imported",
            "imported_count": imported_count,
            "ignored_count": len(ignored_rows),
        }

    async def cancel_upload(self, upload_id: int):
        upload = await self.repo.get_by_id(upload_id)
        if not upload:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="上传记录不存在", code="UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND")
        if upload.status not in ("pending", "parsed"):
            raise BusinessConflictError(
                detail="当前状态不可取消", code="UPLOAD_STATUS_INVALID"
            )
        upload.status = "cancelled"
        await self.db.commit()
        return upload

    async def _parse_excel(self, upload):
        from app.processors.excel_parser import ExcelParser

        upload.status = "parsing"
        await self.db.commit()

        try:
            parser = ExcelParser(self.db)
            preview_data = await parser.parse(upload.file_path, upload.tournament_id)
            upload.preview_data = preview_data
            upload.status = "parsed"
            upload.total_rows = len(preview_data)
            upload.valid_rows = sum(1 for r in preview_data if r["row_status"] == "normal")
            upload.error_rows = sum(1 for r in preview_data if r["row_status"] != "normal")
            await self.db.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            upload.status = "parse_failed"
            upload.error_log = str(e)
            await self.db.commit()

```

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
from openpyxl import load_workbook
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.repositories.player_repo import PlayerRepository
from app.repositories.tournament_repo import TournamentRepository


class ExcelParser:
    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession):
        self.db = db
        self.player_repo = PlayerRepository(db)
        self.tournament_repo = TournamentRepository(db)

    async def parse(self, file_path: str, tournament_id: int) -> list[dict]:
        tournament = await self.tournament_repo.get_by_id(tournament_id)
        wb = load_workbook(file_path, read_only=True)
        ws = wb.active

        rows = list(ws.iter_rows(min_row=2, values_only=True))
        preview = []

        for idx, row in enumerate(rows, start=1):
            if not row or all(cell is None for cell in row):
                continue

            # Expected columns: result_type, player1_name, player2_name, is_cross_province, is_cross_border
            result_type = str(row[0]).strip() if row[0] else "participant"
            player1_name = str(row[1]).strip() if len(row) > 1 and row[1] else None
            player2_name = str(row[2]).strip() if len(row) > 2 and row[2] else None
            is_cross_province = bool(row[3]) if len(row) > 3 and row[3] else False
            is_cross_border = bool(row[4]) if len(row) > 4 and row[4] else False

            player1_id = None
            player1_matched = False
            player2_id = None
            player2_matched = False
            row_status = "normal"
            error_message = None

            if player1_name:
                p1 = await self.player_repo.get_by_name(player1_name)
                if p1:
                    player1_id = p1.id
                    player1_matched = True
                else:
                    row_status = "warning"
                    error_message = f"选手'{player1_name}'未匹配"

            if player2_name:
                p2 = await self.player_repo.get_by_name(player2_name)
                if p2:
                    player2_id = p2.id
                    player2_matched = True
                else:
                    if error_message:
                        error_message += f"；选手'{player2_name}'未匹配"
                    else:
                        error_message = f"选手'{player2_name}'未匹配"
                    row_status = "warning"

            preview.append({
                "row_number": idx,
                "tournament_name": tournament.name if tournament else None,
                "level": tournament.level if tournament else None,
                "group_name": tournament.group_name if tournament else None,
                "result_type": result_type,
                "player1_name": player1_name,
                "player1_id": player1_id,
                "player1_matched": player1_matched,
                "player2_name": player2_name,
                "player2_id": player2_id,
                "player2_matched": player2_matched,
                "is_cross_province": is_cross_province,
                "is_cross_border": is_cross_border,
                "estimated_points": None,
                "row_status": row_status,
                "error_message": error_message,
            })

        wb.close()
        return preview

```

File created successfully at: /Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/backend/app/processors/excel_parser.py
```

```python
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.exceptions import BusinessConflictError, NotFoundError
from app.models.entries_points import EntriesPoints
from app.repositories.entries_points_repo import EntriesPointsRepository
from app.repositories.event_result_repo import EventResultRepository
from app.repositories.points_rule_repo import PointsRuleRepository
from app.repositories.tournament_repo import TournamentRepository


class PointsService:
    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession):
        self.db = db
        self.tournament_repo = TournamentRepository(db)
        self.event_result_repo = EventResultRepository(db)
        self.points_rule_repo = PointsRuleRepository(db)
        self.entries_repo = EntriesPointsRepository(db)

    async def generate_points(self, tournament_id: int):
        tournament = await self.tournament_repo.get_by_id(tournament_id)
        if not tournament:
            raise NotFoundError(detail="赛事不存在", code="TOURNAMENT_NOT_FOUND")
        if tournament.status != "completed":
            raise BusinessConflictError(
                detail="请先完成赛事结果导入", code="POINTS_TOURNAMENT_NOT_COMPLETED"
            )

        already_exists = await self.entries_repo.exists_for_tournament(tournament_id)
        if already_exists:
            raise BusinessConflictError(
                detail="该赛事积分已生成", code="POINTS_ALREADY_GENERATED"
            )

        from app.processors.points_generator import PointsGenerator

        generator = PointsGenerator(self.db)
        await generator.generate(tournament)

        tournament.status = "published"
        await self.db.commit()

        return {"tournament_id": tournament_id, "message": "积分生成任务已提交"}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.models.entries_points import EntriesPoints
from app.models.tournament import Tournament
from app.repositories.event_result_repo import EventResultRepository
from app.repositories.points_rule_repo import PointsRuleRepository


class PointsGenerator:
    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession):
        self.db = db
        self.event_result_repo = EventResultRepository(db)
        self.points_rule_repo = PointsRuleRepository(db)

    async def generate(self, tournament: Tournament):
        event_results = await self.event_result_repo.get_by_tournament(tournament.id)
        rules = await self.points_rule_repo.list(season_id=tournament.season_id)

        for result in event_results:
            points_value = self._match_rule(rules, tournament, result)
            player_ids = await self.event_result_repo.get_players_for_result(result.id)

            if result.team_id and result.team_member_count and result.team_member_count > 0:
                # Team share: split points among members
                share = round(points_value / result.team_member_count)
                for pid in player_ids:
                    self.db.add(EntriesPoints(
                        player_id=pid,
                        tournament_id=tournament.id,
                        season_id=tournament.season_id,
                        source_type="team_share",
                        points_earned=share,
                        result_type=result.result_type,
                        description=f"团队{result.result_type} {points_value} 分，{result.team_member_count} 人分摊",
                        team_id=result.team_id,
                        team_total_points=points_value,
                        team_member_count=result.team_member_count,
                        event_result_id=result.id,
                    ))
            else:
                # Individual: each player gets full points
                for pid in player_ids:
                    self.db.add(EntriesPoints(
                        player_id=pid,
                        tournament_id=tournament.id,
                        season_id=tournament.season_id,
                        source_type="individual_event",
                        points_earned=points_value,
                        result_type=result.result_type,
                        description=f"{tournament.name} {tournament.group_name or ''} {result.result_type}".strip(),
                        event_result_id=result.id,
                    ))

                # Travel bonus
                for pid in player_ids:
                    if result.is_cross_border:
                        self.db.add(EntriesPoints(
                            player_id=pid,
                            tournament_id=tournament.id,
                            season_id=tournament.season_id,
                            source_type="travel_bonus",
                            points_earned=500,
                            description="跨境参赛奖补",
                            event_result_id=result.id,
                        ))
                    elif result.is_cross_province:
                        self.db.add(EntriesPoints(
                            player_id=pid,
                            tournament_id=tournament.id,
                            season_id=tournament.season_id,
                            source_type="travel_bonus",
                            points_earned=200,
                            description="跨省参赛奖补",
                            event_result_id=result.id,
                        ))

        await self.db.flush()

    def _match_rule(self, rules, tournament: Tournament, result) -> int:
        for rule in rules:
            if rule.rule_type != "individual_event" and rule.rule_type != "team_event":
                continue
            if rule.event_level and rule.event_level != tournament.level:
                continue
            if rule.group_name and rule.group_name != tournament.group_name:
                continue
            if rule.result_type and rule.result_type != result.result_type:
                continue
            if rule.enabled:
                return rule.points
        return 0

```

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Python 3.11 + FastAPI + Pydantic v2 + SQLAlchemy 2.0 (async) + Alembic
   - PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7 + ARQ (async tasks, though MVP parses Excel synchronously)
   - 4-layer architecture: Router → Service → Processor → Repository
   - JWT Bearer Token auth (HS256, 24h expiry, bcrypt passwords)
   - Async SQLAlchemy with asyncpg driver
   - pytest + pytest-asyncio + httpx AsyncClient for testing
   - Rankings computed dynamically via RANK() window function (no materialized view)
   - Individual doubles: each player gets full points
   - Team share: round(team_total / member_count)
   - Travel bonus: cross-province 200, cross-border 500
   - State machines: Season (draft→active→closed), Tournament (draft→completed→published), Upload (pending→parsing→parsed→imported)
   - Only one active season at a time
   - uv as package manager, ruff for linting

3. Files and Code Sections:
   
   - `docs/05_prd/prd-v1.0.md` — Complete PRD with 14 sections covering product background, goals, users, scenarios, 10 functional modules, pages, state flows, data objects, API dependencies, MVP/non-MVP scope, acceptance criteria, risks
   
   - `docs/05_prd/mvp_feature_matrix.md` — 54 features across 10 categories with priority (P0/P1/P2), implementation status, page/API/model mapping, frontend annotation rules

   - `backend/app/core/database.py` — Async engine + session factory + get_db generator

   - `backend/app/core/exceptions.py` — AppException hierarchy (NotFoundError→404, BusinessConflictError→409, AuthenticationError→401, ValidationError→422) + global handler

_**Agent (claude-opus-4.6 2026-05-14 09:43:52Z)**_

The `list` method return annotation `-> list[PointsRule]:` is on line 13, which is the same method definition — the annotation is evaluated before the method is bound, so it should be fine since `list` hasn't been shadowed yet at that point. Actually wait — in Python, the class body is executed top-to-bottom, and the annotation on line 13 is part of the `def list` statement itself. The name `list` hasn't been assigned yet at that point, so the builtin is still accessible. The problem in `player_repo.py` was that `get_departments` (line 42) comes AFTER the `list` method (line 11), so by then `self.list` has shadowed the builtin `list` in the class namespace.

Actually, that's not quite right either — method names don't shadow builtins in the class scope for other method annotations. Let me just add `from __future__ import annotations` to all repository files that have a `list` method to be safe.

Progress — 5 tests passed. The remaining issue is a bcrypt version incompatibility with passlib. The newer bcrypt 5.x rejects passwords > 72 bytes. The issue is in the `hash_password` function. Let me check the security module.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4.6 2026-05-14 09:44:57Z)**_

The issue is that passlib with bcrypt 5.x has compatibility problems. The `JWT_SECRET_KEY` is being used as a password somewhere, or the test password is too long. Actually, looking at the error more carefully — the `admin_token` fixture hashes "testpass" which is short. The error says the secret is very long (the `b'0123456...'` string). This is likely the JWT secret key being passed to bcrypt somehow.

Wait, looking again at the traceback — it's the `hash_password("testpass")` call in conftest that triggers it. The issue is passlib + bcrypt 5.0 incompatibility. I need to pin bcrypt to 4.x or configure passlib to truncate.

# 后端测试报告

## 测试环境

- Python: 3.11.15
- pytest: 8.4.2
- pytest-asyncio: 0.26.0
- 数据库: SQLite (aiosqlite) — 用于无 PostgreSQL 环境下的测试
- 运行日期: 2026-05-14

## 测试结果

\```
22 passed, 2 warnings in 3.89s
\```

**全部通过。**

## 测试覆盖模块

| 测试文件 | 测试数 | 状态 | 覆盖内容 |
|----------|--------|------|----------|
| test_health.py | 1 | PASSED | 健康检查接口 |
| test_auth.py | 4 | PASSED | 登录成功/失败、/me 有/无 token |
| test_seasons.py | 4 | PASSED | 创建、列表、激活、非 draft 激活失败 |
| test_players.py | 3 | PASSED | 创建、搜索/筛选、404 |
| test_tournaments.py | 3 | PASSED | 无活跃赛季创建失败、正常创建、编辑 draft |
| test_points_rules.py | 3 | PASSED | 创建、重复失败、删除 |
| test_uploads.py | 1 | PASSED | 无文件上传返回 422 |
| test_rankings.py | 3 | PASSED | 空排行榜、当前赛季、院系列表 |

## Warnings

1. `passlib` 使用了 Python 3.13 将移除的 `crypt` 模块（不影响功能）
2. `pytest-asyncio` 提示 `event_loop` fixture 重定义已废弃（不影响测试执行）

## 已修复的问题

| 问题 | 原因 | 修复方式 |
|------|------|----------|
| `list[str]` TypeError | `list` 方法名遮蔽内置 `list` 类型 | 添加 `from __future__ import annotations` |
| JSONB 不兼容 SQLite | 测试使用 SQLite 不支持 JSONB | 改用 `sqlalchemy.JSON`（兼容两种数据库） |
| bcrypt 5.x 不兼容 passlib | passlib 未适配 bcrypt 5.0 API 变更 | 锁定 bcrypt 至 4.x |
| 模块导入失败 | 项目未配置为可安装包 | 添加 hatchling build-system 配置 |

## 未测试项（MVP 范围外或需要外部依赖）

- Excel 文件上传解析完整流程（需要实际 .xlsx 文件）
- 积分生成完整流程（需要预置赛事结果数据）
- 排行榜刷新（MVP 中为动态查询，无需刷新）
- ARQ Worker 异步任务执行
- PostgreSQL 特有功能（JSONB 索引、窗口函数排名）

## 生产环境注意事项

- 生产环境使用 PostgreSQL 16，可将 `upload.preview_data` 改回 `JSONB` 以获得更好的查询性能
- 建议在 CI 中使用 PostgreSQL 容器运行完整测试
- bcrypt 版本锁定为 4.x，待 passlib 适配 5.x 后可升级

```

```md
# THA Tennis Points Platform — Backend

## 技术栈

- Python 3.11 + FastAPI + Pydantic v2
- SQLAlchemy 2.0 (async) + Alembic
- PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7
- ARQ (异步任务)
- JWT 认证 (HS256)

## 快速开始

### 1. 安装依赖

\```bash
cd backend
uv sync
\```

### 2. 配置环境变量

\```bash
cp .env.example .env
# 编辑 .env，确认数据库和 Redis 连接信息
\```

### 3. 启动基础服务

\```bash
# 项目根目录
docker compose up -d
\```

### 4. 数据库迁移

\```bash
uv run alembic upgrade head
\```

### 5. 初始化种子数据

\```bash
uv run python -m app.scripts.seed
\```

创建管理员账号：`admin` / `admin123`，以及一个初始活跃赛季。

### 6. 启动 API 服务

\```bash
uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
\```

API 文档：http://localhost:8000/docs

## 环境变量

| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| DATABASE_URL | PostgreSQL 连接串 | postgresql+asyncpg://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/tha_tennis |
| TEST_DATABASE_URL | 测试数据库连接串 | postgresql+asyncpg://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/tha_tennis_test |
| REDIS_URL | Redis 连接串 | redis://localhost:6379/0 |
| JWT_SECRET_KEY | JWT 签名密钥 | dev-secret-key-change-in-production |
| JWT_ALGORITHM | JWT 算法 | HS256 |
| JWT_EXPIRE_HOURS | Token 过期时间（小时） | 24 |
| UPLOAD_DIR | 文件上传目录 | ./uploads |
| MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE | 最大上传大小（字节） | 10485760 |
| APP_ENV | 运行环境 | development |
| DEBUG | 调试模式 | true |

## 测试

\```bash
# 运行全部测试
uv run pytest -v

# 运行单个文件
uv run pytest tests/test_auth.py -v

# 带覆盖率
uv run pytest --cov=app
\```

测试默认使用 SQLite（无需 PostgreSQL），配置在 `tests/conftest.py`。

## 代码检查

\```bash
uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff format .
\```

## 项目结构

\```
app/
├── core/           # 配置、安全、依赖注入、异常
├── models/         # SQLAlchemy 模型
├── schemas/        # Pydantic 请求/响应模型
├── repositories/   # 数据访问层
├── services/       # 业务逻辑层
├── processors/     # 复杂业务处理（Excel、积分）
├── routers/        # API 路由
├── workers/        # ARQ 异步任务
├── scripts/        # 脚本（种子数据等）
└── main.py         # 应用入口
\```

```

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4.6 2026-05-14 09:52:01Z)**_

```text
I now have all the information needed. Here is the comprehensive summary.

---

## Summary of Frontend Implementation Requirements

### Files Not Found

Three of the eight requested files do not exist:
- `/Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/docs/10_ui_design/page_wireframe_notes.md` -- does not exist (directory is empty)
- `/Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/docs/10_ui_design/component_notes.md` -- does not exist
- `/Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/docs/10_ui_design/ui_design_prompt.md` -- does not exist

The remaining five files were read successfully. Here is the consolidated information.

---

### 1. Tech Stack

| Concern | User App (H5) | Admin App (Web) |
|---------|---------------|-----------------|
| Framework | Vue 3 + Vite + TypeScript | Vue 3 + Vite + TypeScript |
| Package manager | pnpm | pnpm |
| UI library | None (custom lightweight components) | Element Plus |
| State management | Pinia (if needed) | Pinia (if needed) |
| HTTP client | axios (unified interceptor) | axios (unified interceptor) |
| Target | Mobile-first, responsive | Desktop-first, min-width 1280px |
| Dev server | localhost:5173 | localhost:5174 |

---

### 2. Project Structure Conventions

```
frontend/user/          -- H5 public ranking app
frontend/admin/         -- Admin management app

Within each app:
  views/ or pages/      -- page-level components
  components/           -- reusable components
  api/                  -- API call modules
  types/                -- TypeScript type definitions
```

---

### 3. Routing Structure

**User app** -- single route:
```
/                       -> U-01 Ranking page (only page)
```

**Admin app**:
```
/login                  -> A-01 Login
/dashboard              -> A-08 Dashboard
/seasons                -> A-02 Season management
/players                -> A-03 Player management
/tournaments            -> A-04 Tournament management
/tournaments/:id        -> A-04 Tournament detail
/points-rules           -> A-05 Points rules
/uploads                -> A-06 Excel import
/rankings               -> A-07 Rankings management
```

Login success redirects to `/dashboard`. Token expiry on any page redirects to `/login`.

---

### 4. Pages to Implement (MVP Scope)

**User app (1 page)**:
- U-01: Annual points ranking -- search, department filter, player points detail modal

**Admin app (8 pages + layout)**:
- AdminLayout: top bar + left sidebar + content area
- A-01: Login
- A-02: Season management (CRUD + activate/close)
- A-03: Player management (CRUD + search/filter)
- A-04: Tournament management (CRUD + status display + generate points entry)
- A-05: Points rules (multi-tab by rule type, CRUD + delete confirmation)
- A-06: Excel import (step wizard: upload -> parse -> preview -> confirm -> done)
- A-07: Rankings management (view + refresh + player detail modal)
- A-08: Dashboard (stat cards + recent uploads + quick links)

**Complexity assessment**:
- High: A-06 (Excel import -- step bar, file upload, async polling, preview table, row-level actions)
- Medium: U-01, A-04, A-05, A-07
- Low: A-01, A-02, A-03, A-08

---

### 5. Components Needed

**User app components**:
| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| RankingHeader | System title + season info |
| RankingFilter | Name search + department dropdown |
| RankingTable | Desktop table layout |
| RankingCardList | Mobile card layout |
| PlayerPointsDialog | Player points detail modal |
| PointsSummary | Points by category |
| PointsDetailList | Individual points records |
| EmptyState | No data / error state |

**Admin app components**:
| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| AdminLayout | Shell: top bar + sidebar + content |
| DataTable | Generic paginated table |
| FormDialog | Generic form modal |
| StatusTag | Colored status badges |
| StepBar | Excel import wizard steps |
| FileUploader | Drag-and-drop file upload |
| ImportPreviewTable | Row-level preview with status |
| PlayerPointsDialog | Reused from user app |
| StatCard | Dashboard number cards |
| ConfirmAction | Secondary confirmation modal |
| RecentActivityList | Dashboard recent uploads |
| TabPanel | Tab switching for points rules |
| LoginForm | Login page form |

---

### 6. API Integration Rules

- Base URL: `/api/v1`
- Public endpoints: `/api/v1/public/*`
- Admin endpoints: `/api/v1/admin/*`
- Dev proxy: Vite proxy to `http://localhost:8000`
- Auth: `Authorization: Bearer {token}` on all admin requests
- Pagination: `page` (default 1), `page_size` (default 20)
- Response shape: `{ data, total, page, page_size }` for lists; `{ detail, code }` for errors

**Global error interception** (handled by axios interceptor):
- `AUTH_TOKEN_MISSING` / `AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED` / `AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID` -> clear token, redirect to login
- `SYSTEM_INTERNAL_ERROR` -> toast "system error"
- `RATE_LIMITED` -> toast "too frequent"

**Business error handling**:
- 422 validation errors -> show on form fields
- 409 conflict -> global toast with reason
- 404 -> "data not found"
- 500 -> "system error, retry later"
- Timeout (frontend-detected) -> "request timeout" + retry button

---

### 7. Key Architectural Constraints and Decisions

**Frontend responsibilities**:
- Rendering, interaction, form format validation, routing, error display
- Token storage and management
- Loading/empty/error UI states
- Responsive layout switching (table vs card)

**Frontend must NOT do**:
- Points calculation, ranking calculation, team points splitting
- Business validation (tournament level legality, rule matching)
- State transitions (season/tournament/upload status changes)
- Data aggregation or caching as source of truth
- Final permission control (UI hiding only, backend enforces)

**Data refresh strategy**:
- User ranking: fetch on page load, no polling
- Admin lists: re-fetch after mutations
- Excel parse status: poll every 3 seconds until terminal state
- Rankings refresh status: poll every 3 seconds until complete
- Points generation status: poll every 3 seconds until complete

---

### 8. MVP Scope Boundaries

**In scope**:
- All pages listed above (U-01, A-01 through A-08)
- Full main flow: login -> season -> rules -> players -> tournament -> Excel import -> confirm -> generate points -> refresh rankings -> user views rankings

**Explicitly out of scope**:
- WeChat mini-program
- Player personal homepage
- Multi-season switching
- Data export pages
- Dark mode
- Internationalization (i18n)
- Department management page
- Team management page
- Audit log page
- AI parse log page
- System settings page
- Ranking trend charts
- Department-level rankings
- Tournament detail page (user-side)

**Disabled features (button visible but greyed out with "coming soon" tooltip)**:
- "Download Excel template" button
- "Export rankings" button

**Hidden features (no UI entry at all)**:
- Everything else not in MVP

---

### 9. Development Priority Order

The documents prescribe this exact sequence, with each page validated against the backend before moving to the next:

1. A-01 Login (validate auth mechanism)
2. AdminLayout (shell for all admin pages)
3. A-02 Season management (establish basic CRUD pattern)
4. A-03 Player management (establish search/filter pattern)
5. A-04 Tournament management (status-constrained UI pattern)
6. A-05 Points rules (CRUD + delete constraints)
7. A-06 Excel import (async flow UI pattern)
8. A-07 Rankings management (data display + refresh)
9. U-01 Public ranking page (user-facing endpoint)
10. A-08 Dashboard (supplementary, can be simplified)

---

### 10. Key Interaction Patterns from Figma Brief

- Admin layout: left sidebar navigation + right content area, top bar shows system name, current season, admin name, logout
- All admin list pages follow: title bar with action button -> filter area -> data table -> form/detail modal
- Excel import uses a linear step wizard (not tabs)
- Season activate/close requires secondary confirmation modal
- Tournament detail can be a drawer or sub-page, must prominently feature "generate points" button
- Points rules page uses type-based filtering (or tabs) to organize rules
- Dashboard is stat-card focused, not a complex analytics dashboard
- User ranking page: mobile-first card layout, desktop table layout, player detail as overlay modal
- Reuse the same PlayerPointsDialog component in both U-01 and A-07

---

### 11. Prohibitions (from CLAUDE.md)

1. No faking backend capabilities with local mock data in production code
2. No local computation replacing backend logic (points, rankings, matching)
3. No assuming API structure -- must follow `api_spec-v1.0.md` exactly
4. No implementing features marked "not in this phase"
5. No hardcoding business data (departments, tournament levels) -- fetch from backend or reference documented enums
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4.6 2026-05-14 09:51:20Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="Agent"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Agent**</summary>
Explore API spec and MVP matrix

```text
Here is the full summary of all three documents.

---

## 1. API Specification (api_spec-v1.0.md)

### Base Configuration

- Base URL: `/api/v1`
- Public prefix: `/api/v1/public` (no auth)
- Admin prefix: `/api/v1/admin` (Bearer Token)
- Content-Type: `application/json` (file uploads use `multipart/form-data`)
- Pagination: `page` (default 1), `page_size` (default 20, max 100)

### Response Envelope

Success (single object):
```json
{ "data": { ... }, "message": "ok" }
```

Success (list):
```json
{ "data": [ ... ], "total": 100, "page": 1, "page_size": 20 }
```

Error:
```json
{ "detail": "错误描述", "code": "ERROR_CODE" }
```

### Complete Endpoint List

**Public Endpoints (no auth)**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/public/seasons/current` | Get current active season |
| GET | `/api/v1/public/rankings` | Query leaderboard (params: page, page_size, search, department) |
| GET | `/api/v1/public/players/{player_id}/points` | Player points breakdown |
| GET | `/api/v1/public/departments` | Department list for filter dropdown |

**Auth Endpoints**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/auth/login` | Login, returns JWT |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/auth/me` | Validate token, get current user |

**Season Endpoints**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/seasons` | List all seasons |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/seasons` | Create season (status defaults to draft) |
| PUT | `/api/v1/admin/seasons/{id}` | Update season |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/seasons/{id}/activate` | Activate season (auto-closes previous active) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/seasons/{id}/close` | Close active season |

**Player Endpoints**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/players` | List players (params: page, page_size, search, department) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/players` | Create player |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/players/{id}` | Get single player |
| PUT | `/api/v1/admin/players/{id}` | Update player |

**Tournament Endpoints**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/tournaments` | List tournaments (params: page, page_size, status, season_id) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/tournaments` | Create tournament (season_id auto-assigned) |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/tournaments/{id}` | Get single tournament |
| PUT | `/api/v1/admin/tournaments/{id}` | Update tournament (draft only) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/tournaments/{id}/generate-points` | Trigger points generation (status must be completed) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/tournaments/{id}/revoke-publish` | Revoke publish (status must be published) |

**Points Rules Endpoints**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/points-rules` | List rules (params: season_id, rule_type) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/points-rules` | Create rule |
| PUT | `/api/v1/admin/points-rules/{id}` | Update rule |
| DELETE | `/api/v1/admin/points-rules/{id}` | Delete rule (fails if referenced) |

**Upload/Import Endpoints**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/uploads` | Upload Excel (multipart/form-data: file + tournament_id) |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}` | Poll upload status (pending -> parsing -> parsed/parse_failed) |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}/preview` | Get parsed row preview (only when status=parsed) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}/confirm` | Confirm import with confirmed_rows/ignored_rows arrays |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}/cancel` | Cancel upload (when pending or parsed) |

**Rankings Endpoints (admin)**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/rankings` | Admin leaderboard (same params/response as public) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/rankings/refresh` | Trigger leaderboard refresh (returns 202) |

**Dashboard Endpoint**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/dashboard` | System overview stats |

**Health Check**

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/api/v1/health` | Service availability check |

### Key Request/Response Structures

**Login request:** `{ "username": string, "password": string }`
**Login response:** `{ access_token, token_type, expires_in, user: { id, username, display_name } }`

**Rankings response item:** `{ ranking, player_id, full_name, department, age, total_points, tournament_count }`

**Player points response:** `{ player: {...}, summary: { individual_event, team_share, travel_bonus, representative_team, organizer_bonus, donation_bonus }, details: [...] }`

**Upload preview row:** `{ row_number, tournament_name, level, group_name, result_type, player1_name, player1_id, player1_matched, player2_name, player2_id, player2_matched, is_cross_province, is_cross_border, estimated_points, row_status (normal/warning/error), error_message }`

**Confirm import request:** `{ "confirmed_rows": [int], "ignored_rows": [int] }`

**Dashboard response:** `{ current_season, player_count, tournament_count, points_record_count, recent_uploads: [...] }`

### Async Task Patterns (frontend must poll)

1. Excel parsing: POST upload -> poll GET uploads/{id} every 3s -> when parsed, GET preview -> POST confirm
2. Points generation: POST generate-points (returns 202) -> poll GET tournaments/{id} until status=published
3. Rankings refresh: POST refresh (returns 202) -> GET rankings for updated data

---

## 2. MVP Feature Matrix (mvp_feature_matrix.md)

### Priority Summary

| Priority | Count | Implemented | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|-------------|
| P0 | 35 | 35 (all) | Core must-have features |
| P1 | 6 | 6 (all) | Important, implemented but can be simplified |
| P2 | 13 | 0 | Enhancement features, NOT in MVP |

### P0 Features (35 total, all implemented)

**Public (6):**
- P-01: View leaderboard
- P-02: Search leaderboard by name
- P-03: Filter leaderboard by department
- P-04: View player points detail
- P-05: Get department list
- P-06: Get current season info

**Auth (3):**
- A-01: Admin login
- A-02: Token validation / session persistence
- A-03: Logout

**Season Management (4):**
- S-01: View season list
- S-02: Create season
- S-03: Edit season
- S-04: Activate season

**Player Management (6):**
- PL-01 through PL-06: List, create, edit, view detail, search, filter by department

**Tournament Management (6):**
- T-01 through T-06: List, create, edit, view detail, filter by status, filter by season

**Points Rules (5):**
- R-01 through R-05: List, create, edit, delete, filter by type

**Excel Import (4):**
- U-01 through U-04: Upload, poll status, preview, confirm

**Points Generation (2):**
- PT-01: Trigger generation
- PT-02: Query generation status

**Rankings Admin (2):**
- RK-01: View admin leaderboard
- RK-02: Refresh leaderboard

### P1 Features (6 total, all implemented)

- S-05: Close season
- T-07: Revoke tournament publish
- U-05: Cancel upload
- D-01: View system overview (dashboard)
- D-02: View recent uploads (dashboard)

### P2 Features (13 total, NONE implemented)

- P-07: Multi-season switching
- P-08: Player personal page
- A-04: Change password
- S-06: Delete season
- PL-07: Batch import players
- PL-08: Disable/enable player
- T-08: Delete tournament
- R-06: Batch import rules
- R-07: Rule templates/presets
- U-06: Download Excel template (button shown greyed out with "coming soon")
- U-07: Upload history list
- PT-03: Points generation log
- RK-03: Export leaderboard (button shown greyed out with "coming soon")
- D-03: Data trend charts

### Frontend Handling of Unimplemented Features

| Treatment | When | Examples |
|-----------|------|----------|
| Hidden entirely | Feature not visible | Batch import, upload history |
| Button greyed + "coming soon" | Entry visible but disabled | Download template, export leaderboard |
| Button hidden | Action entry not visible | Delete season, delete tournament |

### Recommended Development Order

1. Auth (A-01~A-03)
2. Season management (S-01~S-05)
3. Player management (PL-01~PL-06)
4. Tournaments (T-01~T-06) + Points rules (R-01~R-05) -- in parallel
5. Excel import (U-01~U-05)
6. Points generation (PT-01~PT-02)
7. Rankings (RK-01~RK-02) + Public pages (P-01~P-06)
8. Dashboard (D-01~D-02) + Revoke publish (T-07)

---

## 3. PRD (prd-v1.0.md)

### Page List

**User-facing (H5, mobile-first):**

| Page | ID | Description |
|------|----|-------------|
| Leaderboard | U-01 | Rankings table, search, department filter, player detail modal |

**Admin (Web, desktop-first, min 1280px):**

| Page | ID | Description |
|------|----|-------------|
| Login | A-01 | Username + password form |
| Season Management | A-02 | List with activate/close buttons, create/edit modal |
| Player Management | A-03 | List + search + filter, create/edit modal |
| Tournament Management | A-04 | List + status filter, create/edit modal, detail page with "generate points" button |
| Points Rules | A-05 | Grouped by type, create/edit/delete |
| Excel Import | A-06 | Select tournament -> upload -> progress -> preview table -> checkbox confirm |
| Rankings (admin) | A-07 | Same as public + refresh button |
| Dashboard | A-08 | Stats cards + recent uploads list |

### User Flows

**Flow 1 - Alumni views leaderboard:**
Open H5 page -> see current season leaderboard -> search by name or filter by department -> click player name -> see points detail modal (category summary + line items)

**Flow 2 - Admin full operation chain:**
Create season -> Activate season -> Configure points rules -> Add players -> Create tournament -> Upload Excel results -> Review preview -> Confirm import -> Generate points -> Refresh leaderboard

**Flow 3 - Points generation core flow:**
Upload Excel -> System parses and matches players -> Admin reviews preview (confirm/ignore rows) -> Confirm import writes to event_results -> Trigger points generation (matches rules, calculates points) -> Tournament status becomes published -> Leaderboard data updates

### State Machines

- Season: `draft -> active -> closed`
- Tournament: `draft -> completed -> published` (with revoke back to completed)
- Upload: `pending -> parsing -> parsed -> imported` (with parse_failed and cancelled branches)

### Explicitly Out of Scope (NOT in MVP)

| Feature | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| WeChat Mini Program | MVP is H5 only |
| User account system | Public pages need no login |
| AI smart matching | Exact name match first, AI deferred |
| Data export (Excel/PDF) | Not supported in admin |
| Operation audit log | No admin action logging |
| Multi-season comparison | Leaderboard shows current season only |
| Push notifications | No points change notifications |
| Batch player import | Players entered one by one |
| CI/CD | Manual deployment this phase |
| Internationalization | Chinese only |
| Dark mode | Not implemented |

### Key Technical Constraints for Frontend

- Mobile-first for H5 (iOS Safari 14+, Android Chrome 80+, WeChat browser)
- Desktop-first for admin (min 1280px)
- Use Element Plus component library
- Fixed left sidebar navigation
- Tables paginated at 20 rows/page by default
- Buttons dynamically enabled/disabled based on entity status
- Async operations (upload parsing, points generation) show loading state
- Destructive actions (delete, revoke) require confirmation dialog
- Search input: 300ms debounce
- First screen load: leaderboard top 20 items

### Acceptance Criteria (non-functional)

- First screen load < 3 seconds (local network)
- API response < 500ms (sync endpoints)
- Support 10 concurrent admin users
- Support 500 players, 50 tournaments, 5000 points records

---

The relevant files are:
- `/Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/docs/08_api_spec/api_spec-v1.0.md`
- `/Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/docs/05_prd/mvp_feature_matrix.md`
- `/Users/Zhuanz/Tennis points platform/docs/05_prd/prd-v1.0.md`
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./docs/08_api_spec/api_spec-v1.0.md`

```text
1	# API 规范 v1.0
2	
3	> 本文定义 THA 年度赛事积分系统 MVP 阶段的完整 API 契约。
4	>
5	> 前后端实现必须以本文档为准。字段来源于数据模型字段字典，状态值与流程状态规范一致。
6	
7	---
8	
9	## 1. 通用约定
10	
11	### 1.1 基础信息
12	
13	| 项目 | 值 |
14	|---|---|
15	| Base URL | /api/v1 |
16	| 公共接口前缀 | /api/v1/public |
17	| 管理接口前缀 | /api/v1/admin |
18	| 内容类型 | application/json（文件上传为 multipart/form-data） |
19	| 认证方式 | Bearer Token（管理接口） |
20	| 分页参数 | page（默认 1）、page_size（默认 20，最大 100） |
21	
22	### 1.2 通用响应结构
23	
24	成功（单对象）：
25	
26	```json
27	{
28	  "data": { ... },
29	  "message": "ok"
30	}
31	```
32	
33	成功（列表）：
34	
35	```json
36	{
37	  "data": [ ... ],
38	  "total": 100,
39	  "page": 1,
40	  "page_size": 20
41	}
42	```
43	
44	错误：
45	
46	```json
47	{
48	  "detail": "错误描述",
49	  "code": "ERROR_CODE"
50	}
51	```
52	
53	---
54	
55	## 2. 公共接口
56	
57	### 2.1 获取当前赛季
58	
59	| 项目 | 值 |
60	|---|---|
61	| 方法 | GET |
62	| 路径 | /api/v1/public/seasons/current |
63	| 用途 | 获取当前激活赛季信息 |
64	| 调用时机 | 用户端页面加载时 |
65	| 认证 | 无 |
66	
67	响应示例：
68	
69	```json
70	{
71	  "data": {
72	    "id": 1,
73	    "name": "2026-2027 THA 赛季",
74	    "start_date": "2026-04-20",
75	    "end_date": "2027-04-20",
76	    "status": "active"
77	  }
78	}
79	```
80	
81	---
82	
83	### 2.2 查询排行榜
84	
85	| 项目 | 值 |
86	|---|---|
87	| 方法 | GET |
88	| 路径 | /api/v1/public/rankings |
89	| 用途 | 查询年度积分排行榜 |
90	| 调用时机 | 用户端排行榜页面加载、搜索、筛选时 |
91	| 认证 | 无 |
92	
93	请求参数（Query）：
94	
95	| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
96	|---|---|---|---|
97	| page | integer | 否 | 页码，默认 1 |
98	| page_size | integer | 否 | 每页条数，默认 20 |
99	| search | string | 否 | 姓名模糊搜索 |
100	| department | string | 否 | 院系精确筛选 |
101	
102	响应示例：
103	
104	```json
105	{
106	  "data": [
107	    {
108	      "ranking": 1,
109	      "player_id": 42,
110	      "full_name": "张三",
111	      "department": "计算机系",
112	      "age": 38,
113	      "total_points": 2680,
114	      "tournament_count": 6
115	    },
116	    {
117	      "ranking": 2,
118	      "player_id": 15,
119	      "full_name": "李四",
120	      "department": "经管学院",
121	      "age": 42,
122	      "total_points": 2400,
123	      "tournament_count": 5
124	    }
125	  ],
126	  "total": 120,
127	  "page": 1,
128	  "page_size": 20
129	}
130	```
131	
132	字段说明：
133	
134	| 字段 | 来源 | 说明 |
135	|---|---|---|
136	| ranking | 动态计算 | RANK() 窗口函数，同积分并列 |
137	| player_id | Player.id | 选手 ID |
138	| full_name | Player.full_name | 姓名 |
139	| department | Player.department | 院系 |
140	| age | 动态计算 | 当前日期 - Player.birth_date |
141	| total_points | 动态计算 | SUM(EntriesPoints.points_earned) |
142	| tournament_count | 动态计算 | COUNT(DISTINCT tournament_id) |
143	
144	---
145

152	| 用途 | 查询某位选手的积分构成和明细 |

207	
208	---
209	
210	### 2.4 查询院系列表
211	
212	| 项目 | 值 |
213	|---|---|
214	| 方法 | GET |
215	| 路径 | /api/v1/public/departments |
216	| 用途 | 获取院系列表用于筛选器 |
217	| 调用时机 | 用户端页面加载时 |
218	| 认证 | 无 |
219	
220	响应示例：
221	
222	```json

225	}
226	```
227	
228	---
229	
230	## 3. 管理接口 - 认证
231	
232	### 3.1 管理员登录
233	
234	| 项目 | 值 |
235	|---|---|
236	| 方法 | POST |
237	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/auth/login |
238	| 用途 | 管理员登录获取 Token |
239	| 调用时机 | 管理端登录页提交 |
240	| 认证 | 无 |
241	
242	请求体：
243	
244	```json
245	{
246	  "username": "admin",
247	  "password": "password123"
248	}
249	```
250	
251	响应示例：
252	
253	```json
254	{
255	  "data": {
256	    "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
257	    "token_type": "bearer",
258	    "expires_in": 86400,
259	    "user": {
260	      "id": 1,
261	      "username": "admin",
262	      "display_name": "管理员"
263	    }
264	  }
265	}
266	```
267	
268	### 3.2 获取当前用户
269	
270	| 项目 | 值 |
271	|---|---|
272	| 方法 | GET |
273	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/auth/me |
274	| 用途 | 验证 Token 有效性并获取用户信息 |
275	| 调用时机 | 管理端页面刷新时 |
276	| 认证 | 是 |
277

543	## 8. 管理接口 - Excel 导入
544	
545	### 8.1 上传 Excel
546	
547	| 项目 | 值 |
548	|---|---|
549	| 方法 | POST |
550	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/uploads |
551	| 用途 | 上传赛事结果 Excel 文件 |
552	| 调用时机 | 管理员在 Excel 导入页选择文件后 |
553	| 认证 | 是 |
554	| Content-Type | multipart/form-data |
555	
556	请求参数：
557	
558	| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
559	|---|---|---|---|
560	| file | File | 是 | Excel 文件（.xlsx） |
561	| tournament_id | integer | 是 | 关联赛事 ID |
562	
563	响应示例（201）：
564	
565	```json
566	{
567	  "data": {
568	    "id": 10,
569	    "tournament_id": 5,
570	    "filename": "THA500成都站结果.xlsx",
571	    "status": "pending",
572	    "created_at": "2026-08-20T14:30:00"
573	  }
574	}
575	```
576	
577	上传成功后系统自动触发异步解析任务。
578	
579	### 8.2 查询上传状态
580	
581	| 项目 | 值 |
582	|---|---|
583	| 方法 | GET |
584	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/uploads/{id} |
585	| 用途 | 查询上传处理状态（前端轮询） |
586	| 调用时机 | 上传后每 3 秒轮询直到终态 |
587	| 认证 | 是 |
588	
589	响应示例（解析完成）：
590	
591	```json
592	{
593	  "data": {
594	    "id": 10,
595	    "tournament_id": 5,
596	    "filename": "THA500成都站结果.xlsx",
597	    "status": "parsed",
598	    "total_rows": 12,
599	    "valid_rows": 10,
600	    "error_rows": 2,
601	    "error_log": null,
602	    "created_at": "2026-08-20T14:30:00"
603	  }
604	}
605	```
606	
607	### 8.3 查询导入预览
608	
609	| 项目 | 值 |
610	|---|---|
611	| 方法 | GET |
612	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}/preview |
613	| 用途 | 获取解析后的逐行预览数据 |
614	| 调用时机 | Upload status 变为 parsed 后 |
615	| 认证 | 是 |
616	
617	响应示例：
618	
619	```json
620	{
621	  "data": [
622	    {
623	      "row_number": 1,
624	      "tournament_name": "THA500 成都站",
625	      "level": "THA500",
626	      "group_name": "甲组",
627	      "result_type": "champion",
628	      "player1_name": "张三",
629	      "player1_id": 42,
630	      "player1_matched": true,
631	      "player2_name": "李四",
632	      "player2_id": 15,
633	      "player2_matched": true,
634	      "is_cross_province": true,
635	      "is_cross_border": false,
636	      "estimated_points": 500,
637	      "row_status": "normal",
638	      "error_message": null
639	    },
640	    {
641	      "row_number": 3,
642	      "tournament_name": "THA500 成都站",
643	      "level": "THA500",
644	      "group_name": "甲组",
645	      "result_type": "semifinal",
646	      "player1_name": "小王",
647	      "player1_id": null,
648	      "player1_matched": false,
649	      "player2_name": "赵六",
650	      "player2_id": 28,
651	      "player2_matched": true,
652	      "is_cross_province": false,
653	      "is_cross_border": false,
654	      "estimated_points": 180,
655	      "row_status": "warning",
656	      "error_message": "选手'小王'未匹配"
657	    }
658	  ]
659	}
660	```
661	
662	row_status 取值：normal / warning / error
663	
664	### 8.4 确认导入
665	
666	| 项目 | 值 |
667	|---|---|
668	| 方法 | POST |
669	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}/confirm |
670	| 用途 | 管理员确认导入，将数据写入 event_results |
671	| 调用时机 | 管理员审核预览后点击确认 |
672	| 认证 | 是 |
673	| 约束 | Upload status 必须为 parsed |
674	
675	请求体：
676	
677	```json
678	{
679	  "confirmed_rows": [1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 12],
680	  "ignored_rows": [3, 11]
681	}
682	```
683	
684	响应示例（200）：
685	
686	```json
687	{
688	  "data": {
689	    "upload_id": 10,
690	    "status": "imported",
691	    "imported_count": 10,
692	    "ignored_count": 2
693	  }
694	}
695	```
696	
697	### 8.5 取消上传
698	
699	| 项目 | 值 |
700	|---|---|
701	| 方法 | POST |
702	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/uploads/{id}/cancel |
703	| 用途 | 取消上传 |
704	| 认证 | 是 |
705	| 约束 | Upload status 为 pending 或 parsed 时可取消 |

709	## 9. 管理接口 - 积分生成
710	
711	### 9.1 触发积分生成
712	
713	| 项目 | 值 |
714	|---|---|
715	| 方法 | POST |
716	| 路径 | /api/v1/admin/tournaments/{id}/generate-points |
717	| 用途 | 为已完赛的赛事生成积分记录 |
718	| 调用时机 | Excel 导入完成后 |
719	| 认证 | 是 |
720	| 约束 | Tournament status 必须为 completed |
721	
722	响应示例（202 Accepted）：
723	
724	```json
725	{
726	  "data": {
727	    "tournament_id": 5,
728	    "message": "积分生成任务已提交"
729	  }
730	}
731	```
732	
733	### 9.2 查询赛事积分生成状态
734	
735	通过查询赛事详情接口（GET /admin/tournaments/{id}）的 status 字段判断：
736	- completed：积分尚未生成
737	- published：积分已生成

821	## 12. 健康检查
822	
823	### 12.1 健康检查接口
824	
825	| 项目 | 值 |
826	|---|---|
827	| 方法 | GET |
828	| 路径 | /api/v1/health |
829	| 用途 | 验证服务可用性 |
830	| 认证 | 无 |
831	
832	响应示例：
833	
834	```json
835	{

840	}

843	---
844	
845	## 13. 异步任务接口关系
846	
847	### 13.1 Excel 解析（异步）
848	
849	```text
850	POST /admin/uploads              → 创建上传，返回 upload_id，自动触发解析
851	GET  /admin/uploads/{id}         → 轮询状态（pending → parsing → parsed / parse_failed）
852	GET  /admin/uploads/{id}/preview → 状态为 parsed 时获取预览
853	POST /admin/uploads/{id}/confirm → 确认导入
854	```
855	
856	### 13.2 积分生成（异步）
857	
858	```text
859	POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/generate-points → 触发生成，返回 202
860	GET  /admin/tournaments/{id}                 → 轮询状态（completed → published）
861	```
862	
863	### 13.3 排行榜刷新（异步）
864	
865	```text
866	POST /admin/rankings/refresh → 触发刷新，返回 202
867	GET  /admin/rankings         → 查询最新排行榜
868	```
869	
870	---
871	
872	## 14. MVP 接口优先级
873	
874	### 14.1 MVP 必须实现（P0）
875	
876	| 接口 | 说明 |
877	|---|---|
878	| GET /health | 服务验证 |
879	| POST /admin/auth/login | 登录 |
880	| GET /admin/auth/me | Token 验证 |
881	| GET/POST /admin/seasons | 赛季管理 |
882	| POST /admin/seasons/{id}/activate | 赛季激活 |
883	| GET/POST/PUT /admin/players | 选手管理 |
884	| GET/POST/PUT /admin/tournaments | 赛事管理 |
885	| GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /admin/points-rules | 积分规则 |
886	| POST /admin/uploads | Excel 上传 |
887	| GET /admin/uploads/{id} | 上传状态查询 |
888	| GET /admin/uploads/{id}/preview | 导入预览 |
889	| POST /admin/uploads/{id}/confirm | 确认导入 |
890	| POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/generate-points | 积分生成 |
891	| POST /admin/rankings/refresh | 排行榜刷新 |
892	| GET /public/seasons/current | 当前赛季 |
893	| GET /public/rankings | 排行榜查询 |
894	| GET /public/players/{id}/points | 积分明细 |
895	| GET /public/departments | 院系列表 |
896	
897	### 14.2 MVP 可简化（P1）
898	
899	| 接口 | 说明 |
900	|---|---|
901	| GET /admin/dashboard | 仪表盘（可返回简化数据） |
902	| POST /admin/seasons/{id}/close | 赛季关闭 |
903	| POST /admin/uploads/{id}/cancel | 取消上传 |
904	| POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/revoke-publish | 撤回发布 |
905	| GET /admin/rankings | 管理端排行榜（可复用公共接口） |
906
```
</details></tool-use>

1	# MVP 功能矩阵
2	
3	> 本文定义 THA 年度赛事积分系统 MVP 阶段的完整功能矩阵。
4	>
5	> 每项功能标注优先级、实现状态、页面/接口/数据模型依赖，作为开发排期和验收的参考。
6	
7	---
8	
9	## 1. 功能矩阵
10	
11	### 1.1 公共端功能
12	
13	| # | 功能名称 | 优先级 | 本期实现 | 对应页面 | 对应接口 | 对应数据模型 | 依赖后端 | 未实现时前端标注 |
14	|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
15	| P-01 | 查看排行榜 | P0 | 是 | U-01 | GET /public/rankings | EntriesPoints, Player | 是 | — |
16	| P-02 | 排行榜搜索（姓名） | P0 | 是 | U-01 | GET /public/rankings?search= | Player | 是 | — |
17	| P-03 | 排行榜筛选（院系） | P0 | 是 | U-01 | GET /public/rankings?department= | Player | 是 | — |
18	| P-04 | 查看选手积分明细 | P0 | 是 | U-01（弹窗） | GET /public/players/{id}/points | EntriesPoints, Player, Tournament, Team | 是 | — |
19	| P-05 | 获取院系列表 | P0 | 是 | U-01（筛选器） | GET /public/departments | Player | 是 | — |
20	| P-06 | 获取当前赛季信息 | P0 | 是 | U-01 | GET /public/seasons/current | Season | 是 | — |
21	| P-07 | 多赛季切换查看 | P2 | 否 | — | — | — | — | 否（页面不展示入口） |
22	| P-08 | 选手个人主页 | P2 | 否 | — | — | — | — | 否（页面不展示入口） |
23	
24	### 1.2 管理端 - 认证
25	
26	| # | 功能名称 | 优先级 | 本期实现 | 对应页面 | 对应接口 | 对应数据模型 | 依赖后端 | 未实现时前端标注 |
27	|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
28	| A-01 | 管理员登录 | P0 | 是 | A-01 | POST /admin/auth/login | User | 是 | — |
29	| A-02 | Token 验证/保持登录 | P0 | 是 | 全局 | GET /admin/auth/me | User | 是 | — |
30	| A-03 | 退出登录 | P0 | 是 | 全局（导航栏） | 前端清除 Token | — | 否 | — |
31	| A-04 | 修改密码 | P2 | 否 | — | — | — | — | 否（页面不展示入口） |
32	
33	### 1.3 管理端 - 赛季管理

35	| # | 功能名称 | 优先级 | 本期实现 | 对应页面 | 对应接口 | 对应数据模型 | 依赖后端 | 未实现时前端标注 |
36	|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
37	| S-01 | 查看赛季列表 | P0 | 是 | A-02 | GET /admin/seasons | Season | 是 | — |
38	| S-02 | 创建赛季 | P0 | 是 | A-02 | POST /admin/seasons | Season | 是 | — |
39	| S-03 | 编辑赛季 | P0 | 是 | A-02 | PUT /admin/seasons/{id} | Season | 是 | — |
40	| S-04 | 激活赛季 | P0 | 是 | A-02 | POST /admin/seasons/{id}/activate | Season | 是 | — |
41	| S-05 | 关闭赛季 | P1 | 是 | A-02 | POST /admin/seasons/{id}/close | Season | 是 | — |
42	| S-06 | 删除赛季 | P2 | 否 | — | — | — | — | 否（按钮不展示） |

46	| # | 功能名称 | 优先级 | 本期实现 | 对应页面 | 对应接口 | 对应数据模型 | 依赖后端 | 未实现时前端标注 |

49	| PL-02 | 创建选手 | P0 | 是 | A-03 | POST /admin/players | Player | 是 | — |

54	| PL-07 | 批量导入选手 | P2 | 否 | — | — | — | — | 否（页面不展示入口） |

62	| T-02 | 创建赛事 | P0 | 是 | A-04 | POST /admin/tournaments | Tournament, Season | 是 | — |
63	| T-03 | 编辑赛事 | P0 | 是 | A-04 | PUT /admin/tournaments/{id} | Tournament | 是 | — |

84	| # | 功能名称 | 优先级 | 本期实现 | 对应页面 | 对应接口 | 对应数据模型 | 依赖后端 | 未实现时前端标注 |

94	### 1.8 管理端 - 积分生成
95	
96	| # | 功能名称 | 优先级 | 本期实现 | 对应页面 | 对应接口 | 对应数据模型 | 依赖后端 | 未实现时前端标注 |

118	---
119	
120	## 2. 优先级统计
121	
122	| 优先级 | 功能数 | 本期实现 | 说明 |
123	|---|---|---|---|
124	| P0 | 35 | 35 | 核心功能，必须实现 |
125	| P1 | 6 | 6 | 重要功能，本期实现但可简化 |
126	| P2 | 13 | 0 | 增强功能，本期不实现 |
127	| 合计 | 54 | 41 | — |
128	
129	---
130	
131	## 3. 前端标注规则
132	
133	对于本期不实现的功能，前端处理方式：
134	
135	| 处理方式 | 适用场景 | 示例 |
136	|---|---|---|
137	| 不展示入口 | 功能完全不可见 | 批量导入选手、上传历史列表 |
138	| 按钮置灰 + 标注"即将上线" | 入口可见但不可操作，给用户预期 | 下载 Excel 模板、导出排行榜 |
139	| 按钮不展示 | 操作入口不可见 | 删除赛季、删除赛事 |
140	
141	---
142	
143	## 4. 后端能力依赖说明
144	
145	所有 P0/P1 功能均依赖后端能力，前端不得用本地逻辑替代：
146	
147	| 能力 | 说明 |
148	|---|---|
149	| 积分计算 | 必须由后端根据规则计算，前端仅展示结果 |
150	| 排名计算 | 必须由后端 RANK() 窗口函数计算 |
151	| 选手匹配 | Excel 解析时由后端匹配选手姓名 |
152	| 状态流转 | 所有状态变更由后端控制，前端根据返回状态渲染 UI |
153	| 数据聚合 | 积分汇总、参赛次数等由后端聚合返回 |
154	
155	---
156	
157	## 5. 开发顺序建议
158	
159	基于依赖关系，建议按以下顺序开发：
160	
161	| 批次 | 功能模块 | 原因 |
162	|---|---|---|
163	| 第 1 批 | 认证（A-01~A-03） | 所有管理端功能的前置 |
164	| 第 2 批 | 赛季管理（S-01~S-05） | 赛事和规则的前置 |
165	| 第 3 批 | 选手管理（PL-01~PL-06） | Excel 导入匹配的前置 |
166	| 第 4 批 | 赛事管理（T-01~T-06）+ 积分规则（R-01~R-05） | 可并行开发 |
167	| 第 5 批 | Excel 导入（U-01~U-05） | 依赖赛事和选手 |
168	| 第 6 批 | 积分生成（PT-01~PT-02） | 依赖导入和规则 |
169	| 第 7 批 | 排行榜（RK-01~RK-02）+ 公共端（P-01~P-06） | 依赖积分数据 |
170	| 第 8 批 | 仪表盘（D-01~D-02）+ 撤回发布（T-07） | 补全功能 |
171
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./docs/05_prd/prd-v1.0.md`

```text
1	# 产品需求文档（PRD）v1.0
2	
3	> THA 年度赛事积分系统 MVP 阶段产品需求文档。
4	>
5	> 本文档基于已完成的业务研究、交互设计、架构设计、数据模型和 API 规范收口，作为 UI 设计、前端实现和后端实现的共同输入。
6	
7	---
8	
9	## 1. 产品背景
10	
11	THA（清华校友网球协会）每年组织多场网球赛事，涉及单项双打赛、团体赛、代表队赛事等多种形式。当前积分统计依赖人工 Excel 汇总，存在以下问题：
12	
13	- 积分计算规则复杂（6 种积分来源），人工计算易出错
14	- 排行榜更新滞后，校友无法实时查看排名
15	- 赛事结果分散在多个文件中，缺乏统一管理
16	- 团体赛积分分摊、远程参赛奖补等规则执行不一致
17	
18	系统化平台旨在解决上述问题，建立标准化的积分管理和展示流程。
19	
20	---
21	
22	## 2. 产品目标
23	
24	| 目标 | 衡量标准 |
25	|---|---|
26	| 积分计算自动化 | 管理员上传 Excel 后系统自动匹配规则生成积分 |
27	| 排行榜实时可查 | 校友通过 H5 页面随时查看最新排名 |
28	| 数据准确可追溯 | 每条积分记录可追溯到具体赛事和成绩 |
29	| 管理流程标准化 | 赛季→赛事→上传→生成→发布的固定流程 |
30	
31	---
32	
33	## 3. 目标用户和用户角色
34	
35	| 角色 | 描述 | 使用场景 | 访问方式 |
36	|---|---|---|---|
37	| 校友（公共用户） | THA 会员，参赛选手或关注者 | 查看排行榜、查看个人积分明细 | H5 页面，无需登录 |
38	| 管理员 | THA 赛事运营人员（1-3 人） | 管理赛季、选手、赛事、规则，导入结果，生成积分 | 管理端 Web，需登录 |
39	
40	MVP 阶段不设普通用户账号体系，公共页面无需认证。
41	
42	---
43	
44	## 4. 核心业务场景
45	
46	### 4.1 校友查看排行榜
47	
48	校友打开 H5 页面 → 看到当前赛季排行榜 → 可按姓名搜索或按院系筛选 → 点击某位选手查看积分明细（分类汇总 + 逐条记录）。
49	
50	### 4.2 管理员完整操作链路
51	
52	```
53	创建赛季 → 激活赛季
54	    → 配置积分规则
55	    → 录入选手
56	    → 创建赛事
57	        → 上传 Excel 赛事结果
58	        → 审核预览数据
59	        → 确认导入
60	        → 生成积分
61	    → 刷新排行榜
62	```
63	
64	### 4.3 积分生成核心流程
65	
66	上传 Excel → 系统解析并匹配选手 → 管理员审核预览（确认/忽略行）→ 确认导入写入赛事结果 → 触发积分生成（匹配规则计算积分）→ 赛事状态变为 published → 排行榜数据更新。
67	
68	---
69	
70	## 5. MVP 功能模块
71	
72	### 5.1 模块 F-01：排行榜展示（公共）
73	
74	| 维度 | 说明 |
75	|---|---|
76	| 业务目标 | 校友可实时查看当前赛季积分排名 |
77	| 用户操作 | 浏览排行榜、搜索姓名、筛选院系、查看选手积分明细 |
78	| 前端依赖 | 用户端 H5 页面（U-01） |
79	| 后端依赖 | GET /public/rankings、GET /public/players/{id}/points、GET /public/departments、GET /public/seasons/current |
80	| 数据对象 | EntriesPoints（聚合）、Player、Season |
81	
82	### 5.2 模块 F-02：管理员认证
83	
84	| 维度 | 说明 |
85	|---|---|
86	| 业务目标 | 保护管理端操作，仅授权人员可访问 |
87	| 用户操作 | 输入用户名密码登录、页面刷新保持登录态、退出登录 |
88	| 前端依赖 | 管理端登录页（A-01） |
89	| 后端依赖 | POST /admin/auth/login、GET /admin/auth/me |
90	| 数据对象 | User |
91	
92	### 5.3 模块 F-03：赛季管理
93	
94	| 维度 | 说明 |
95	|---|---|
96	| 业务目标 | 管理积分统计周期，确保同一时间只有一个激活赛季 |
97	| 用户操作 | 创建赛季、编辑赛季、激活赛季、关闭赛季 |
98	| 前端依赖 | 管理端赛季管理页（A-02） |
99	| 后端依赖 | GET/POST /admin/seasons、PUT /admin/seasons/{id}、POST /admin/seasons/{id}/activate、POST /admin/seasons/{id}/close |
100	| 数据对象 | Season |
101	| 业务规则 | 同一时间最多一个 active 赛季；激活新赛季时原 active 自动变 closed |
102	
103	### 5.4 模块 F-04：选手管理
104	
105	| 维度 | 说明 |
106	|---|---|
107	| 业务目标 | 维护参赛校友基础信息，支撑 Excel 导入时的选手匹配 |
108	| 用户操作 | 创建选手、编辑选手、搜索选手、按院系筛选 |
109	| 前端依赖 | 管理端选手管理页（A-03） |
110	| 后端依赖 | GET/POST /admin/players、GET/PUT /admin/players/{id} |
111	| 数据对象 | Player |
112	
113	### 5.5 模块 F-05：赛事管理
114	
115	| 维度 | 说明 |
116	|---|---|
117	| 业务目标 | 记录每场赛事的基本信息，作为积分来源的载体 |
118	| 用户操作 | 创建赛事、编辑赛事、查看赛事列表和详情 |
119	| 前端依赖 | 管理端赛事管理页（A-04） |
120	| 后端依赖 | GET/POST /admin/tournaments、GET/PUT /admin/tournaments/{id} |
121	| 数据对象 | Tournament、Season |
122	| 业务规则 | 赛事自动归属当前 active 赛季；仅 draft 状态可编辑 |
123	
124	### 5.6 模块 F-06：积分规则管理
125	
126	| 维度 | 说明 |
127	|---|---|
128	| 业务目标 | 配置不同赛事级别、组别、成绩对应的积分值 |
129	| 用户操作 | 创建规则、编辑规则、删除规则、按类型筛选 |
130	| 前端依赖 | 管理端积分规则页（A-05） |
131	| 后端依赖 | GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /admin/points-rules |
132	| 数据对象 | PointsRule、Season |
133	| 业务规则 | 同赛季内 (rule_type, event_level, group_name, result_type) 组合唯一；已被引用的规则不可删除 |
134	
135	### 5.7 模块 F-07：Excel 导入
136	
137	| 维度 | 说明 |
138	|---|---|
139	| 业务目标 | 将赛事结果从 Excel 导入系统，支持预览审核 |
140	| 用户操作 | 选择赛事 → 上传文件 → 等待解析 → 审核预览 → 确认/忽略行 → 确认导入 |
141	| 前端依赖 | 管理端 Excel 导入页（A-06） |
142	| 后端依赖 | POST /admin/uploads、GET /admin/uploads/{id}、GET /admin/uploads/{id}/preview、POST /admin/uploads/{id}/confirm、POST /admin/uploads/{id}/cancel |
143	| 数据对象 | Upload、EventResult、EventResultPlayer、Player |
144	| 业务规则 | 仅支持 .xlsx；解析时自动匹配选手姓名；未匹配选手标记为 warning；管理员可选择忽略异常行 |
145	
146	### 5.8 模块 F-08：积分生成
147	
148	| 维度 | 说明 |
149	|---|---|
150	| 业务目标 | 根据赛事结果和积分规则自动计算并生成积分记录 |
151	| 用户操作 | 在赛事详情页点击"生成积分" → 等待完成 → 确认赛事状态变为 published |
152	| 前端依赖 | 管理端赛事详情页（A-04 内） |
153	| 后端依赖 | POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/generate-points、GET /admin/tournaments/{id} |
154	| 数据对象 | EntriesPoints、EventResult、PointsRule、Team、TeamMember |
155	| 业务规则 | 仅 completed 状态赛事可生成积分；单项双打每人获完整积分；团体赛按有效队员数分摊；跨省奖补 200 分、跨境奖补 500 分 |
156	
157	### 5.9 模块 F-09：排行榜管理
158	
159	| 维度 | 说明 |
160	|---|---|
161	| 业务目标 | 管理员可查看和刷新排行榜 |
162	| 用户操作 | 查看管理端排行榜、点击刷新 |
163	| 前端依赖 | 管理端排行榜页（A-07） |
164	| 后端依赖 | GET /admin/rankings、POST /admin/rankings/refresh |
165	| 数据对象 | EntriesPoints（聚合）、Player |
166	
167	### 5.10 模块 F-10：仪表盘
168	
169	| 维度 | 说明 |
170	|---|---|
171	| 业务目标 | 管理员登录后快速了解系统概况 |
172	| 用户操作 | 查看当前赛季、选手数、赛事数、积分记录数、最近上传 |
173	| 前端依赖 | 管理端仪表盘页（A-08） |
174	| 后端依赖 | GET /admin/dashboard |
175	| 数据对象 | Season、Player、Tournament、EntriesPoints、Upload |
176	
177	---
178	
179	## 6. 页面与交互要求
180	
181	### 6.1 用户端（H5）
182	
183	| 页面 | 编号 | 核心交互 |
184	|---|---|---|
185	| 排行榜页 | U-01 | 表格展示排名；顶部搜索框实时筛选；院系下拉筛选；点击姓名弹出积分明细弹窗 |
186	
187	交互要求：
188	- 移动端优先，响应式适配
189	- 首屏加载排行榜前 20 条
190	- 搜索输入 300ms 防抖
191	- 积分明细弹窗展示分类汇总饼图/条形 + 逐条记录列表
192	- 无数据时展示空状态提示
193	
194	### 6.2 管理端（Web）
195	
196	| 页面 | 编号 | 核心交互 |
197	|---|---|---|
198	| 登录页 | A-01 | 用户名+密码表单，登录后跳转仪表盘 |
199	| 赛季管理 | A-02 | 列表+操作按钮（激活/关闭），创建/编辑弹窗 |
200	| 选手管理 | A-03 | 列表+搜索+筛选，创建/编辑弹窗 |
201	| 赛事管理 | A-04 | 列表+状态筛选，创建/编辑弹窗，详情页含"生成积分"按钮 |
202	| 积分规则 | A-05 | 按类型分组展示，创建/编辑/删除操作 |
203	| Excel 导入 | A-06 | 选择赛事→上传文件→解析进度→预览表格→勾选确认 |
204	| 排行榜 | A-07 | 同公共排行榜+刷新按钮 |
205	| 仪表盘 | A-08 | 统计卡片+最近上传列表 |
206	
207	交互要求：
208	- 桌面端优先，最小宽度 1280px
209	- 使用 Element Plus 组件库
210	- 左侧导航栏固定
211	- 表格支持分页（默认 20 条/页）
212	- 操作按钮根据状态动态启用/禁用
213	- 异步操作（上传解析、积分生成）显示 loading 状态
214	- 所有破坏性操作（删除、撤回）需二次确认
215	
216	---
217	
218	## 7. 状态流转摘要
219	
220	### 7.1 赛季（Season）
221	
222	```
223	draft → active → closed
224	```
225	
226	- draft：可编辑、可删除、可激活
227	- active：可编辑、可关闭；同一时间最多一个
228	- closed：仅可查看
229	
230	### 7.2 赛事（Tournament）
231	
232	```
233	draft → completed → published
234	                 ↑←←←←←←←←←↓（撤回发布）
235	```
236	
237	- draft：可编辑、可上传结果
238	- completed：结果已导入，可生成积分
239	- published：积分已生成，可撤回
240	
241	### 7.3 上传（Upload）
242	
243	```
244	pending → parsing → parsed → imported
245	                  ↘ parse_failed
246	          parsed → cancelled
247	```
248	
249	- pending：文件已上传，等待解析
250	- parsing：解析中
251	- parsed：解析完成，等待确认
252	- imported：已确认导入
253	- parse_failed：解析失败
254	- cancelled：已取消
255	
256	---
257	
258	## 8. 数据对象摘要
259	
260	| 实体 | 业务含义 | 核心字段 | 关键关系 |
261	|---|---|---|---|
262	| Season | 赛季 | name, start_date, end_date, status | 1:N → Tournament, PointsRule, EntriesPoints |
263	| Player | 选手 | full_name, gender, birth_date, department | 1:N → EntriesPoints, TeamMember |
264	| Tournament | 赛事 | name, event_category, level, group_name, location, status | 属于 Season；1:N → EventResult, Upload |
265	| EventResult | 赛事结果 | result_type, is_cross_province, is_cross_border | 属于 Tournament；M:N → Player（通过 EventResultPlayer） |
266	| EntriesPoints | 积分记录 | source_type, points_earned, result_type, description | 属于 Player + Tournament + Season |
267	| PointsRule | 积分规则 | rule_type, event_level, group_name, result_type, points | 属于 Season |
268	| Team | 团体 | name, department | 1:N → TeamMember, EventResult |
269	| TeamMember | 团体队员 | is_active | 属于 Team + Player + Tournament |
270	| Upload | 上传记录 | filename, status, total_rows, valid_rows, error_rows | 属于 Tournament |
271	| User | 管理员 | username, password_hash, display_name | 1:N → Upload |
272	
273	---
274	
275	## 9. API 依赖摘要
276	
277	### 9.1 公共接口（无认证）
278	
279	| 接口 | 用途 | 调用页面 |
280	|---|---|---|
281	| GET /public/seasons/current | 获取当前赛季 | U-01 |
282	| GET /public/rankings | 排行榜查询 | U-01 |
283	| GET /public/players/{id}/points | 选手积分明细 | U-01（弹窗） |
284	| GET /public/departments | 院系列表 | U-01（筛选器） |
285	
286	### 9.2 管理接口（Bearer Token）
287	
288	| 接口 | 用途 | 调用页面 |
289	|---|---|---|
290	| POST /admin/auth/login | 登录 | A-01 |
291	| GET /admin/auth/me | Token 验证 | 全局 |
292	| GET/POST /admin/seasons | 赛季列表/创建 | A-02 |
293	| PUT /admin/seasons/{id} | 编辑赛季 | A-02 |
294	| POST /admin/seasons/{id}/activate | 激活赛季 | A-02 |
295	| POST /admin/seasons/{id}/close | 关闭赛季 | A-02 |
296	| GET/POST /admin/players | 选手列表/创建 | A-03 |
297	| GET/PUT /admin/players/{id} | 选手详情/编辑 | A-03 |
298	| GET/POST /admin/tournaments | 赛事列表/创建 | A-04 |
299	| GET/PUT /admin/tournaments/{id} | 赛事详情/编辑 | A-04 |
300	| GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /admin/points-rules | 积分规则 CRUD | A-05 |
301	| POST /admin/uploads | 上传 Excel | A-06 |
302	| GET /admin/uploads/{id} | 上传状态查询 | A-06 |
303	| GET /admin/uploads/{id}/preview | 导入预览 | A-06 |
304	| POST /admin/uploads/{id}/confirm | 确认导入 | A-06 |
305	| POST /admin/uploads/{id}/cancel | 取消上传 | A-06 |
306	| POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/generate-points | 积分生成 | A-04 |
307	| GET /admin/rankings | 管理端排行榜 | A-07 |
308	| POST /admin/rankings/refresh | 刷新排行榜 | A-07 |
309	| POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/revoke-publish | 撤回发布 | A-04 |
310	| GET /admin/dashboard | 仪表盘数据 | A-08 |
311	
312	---
313	
314	## 10. MVP 范围
315	
316	### 10.1 MVP 包含（本期实现）
317	
318	| 类别 | 内容 |
319	|---|---|
320	| 用户端 | 排行榜页（搜索、筛选、积分明细弹窗） |
321	| 管理端 | 登录、赛季管理、选手管理、赛事管理、积分规则管理、Excel 导入、积分生成、排行榜管理、仪表盘 |
322	| 后端 | 全部 P0 接口（25 个）、JWT 认证、异步任务（Excel 解析、积分生成） |
323	| 基础设施 | PostgreSQL、Redis、ARQ Worker、本地文件存储 |
324	
325	### 10.2 MVP 简化处理
326	
327	| 功能 | 简化方式 |
328	|---|---|
329	| 仪表盘 | 返回基础统计数据，不做图表 |
330	| 排行榜 | 动态查询计算，不使用物化视图 |
331	| 文件存储 | 本地磁盘，不接入 OSS |
332	| 管理员 | 单角色，不做权限分级 |
333	| 选手匹配 | 精确姓名匹配，不做模糊/智能匹配 |
334	
335	---
336	
337	## 11. 非 MVP 范围
338	
339	以下功能明确不在本期实现范围内：
340	
341	| 功能 | 原因 |
342	|---|---|
343	| 微信小程序 | MVP 仅 H5，后续根据用户反馈决定 |
344	| 用户账号体系 | 公共端无需登录，MVP 不做用户注册/绑定 |
345	| AI 智能匹配 | 选手匹配先用精确匹配，AI 模块延后 |
346	| 数据导出 | 管理端暂不支持导出 Excel/PDF |
347	| 操作日志 | 不记录管理员操作审计日志 |
348	| 多赛季对比 | 排行榜仅展示当前赛季 |
349	| 通知推送 | 不做积分变动通知 |
350	| 批量导入选手 | 选手逐个录入，不支持批量 Excel 导入 |
351	| CI/CD | 本期手动部署 |
352	| 国际化 | 仅中文 |
353	| 深色模式 | 不做 |
354	
355	---
356	
357	## 12. 验收标准
358	
359	### 12.1 功能验收
360	
361	| 场景 | 验收标准 |
362	|---|---|
363	| 排行榜展示 | 校友打开页面 3 秒内看到排行榜；搜索和筛选响应 < 1 秒 |
364	| 积分明细 | 点击选手姓名后弹窗展示分类汇总和逐条记录，数据与后端一致 |
365	| 管理员登录 | 正确凭证登录成功；错误凭证提示明确错误；Token 过期自动跳转登录 |
366	| 赛季管理 | 创建/激活/关闭流程正常；同一时间只有一个 active 赛季 |
367	| 选手管理 | CRUD 正常；搜索和筛选正常；分页正常 |
368	| 赛事管理 | CRUD 正常；状态约束生效（draft 可编辑，非 draft 不可编辑） |
369	| 积分规则 | CRUD 正常；重复规则创建时报错；已引用规则不可删除 |
370	| Excel 导入 | 上传→解析→预览→确认全流程正常；异常行标识清晰；可选择忽略行 |
371	| 积分生成 | 生成后积分记录正确；单项双打每人完整积分；团体赛按人数分摊 |
372	| 排行榜刷新 | 刷新后排行榜数据与积分记录一致；同积分并列排名 |
373	
374	### 12.2 数据验收
375	
376	| 验证项 | 标准 |
377	|---|---|
378	| 积分计算正确性 | 与人工计算结果一致（抽样 10 条验证） |
379	| 排名正确性 | 同积分并列，下一名跳号（RANK 语义） |
380	| 团体赛分摊 | round(团队总积分 / 有效队员数) |
381	| 远程参赛奖补 | 跨省 200 分、跨境 500 分 |
382	
383	### 12.3 非功能验收
384	
385	| 维度 | 标准 |
386	|---|---|
387	| 页面加载 | 首屏 < 3 秒（本地网络） |
388	| API 响应 | 同步接口 < 500ms |
389	| 并发 | 支持 10 个管理员同时操作 |
390	| 数据量 | 支持 500 选手、50 赛事、5000 积分记录 |
391	
392	---
393	
394	## 13. 风险和限制
395	
396	| 风险 | 影响 | 缓解措施 |
397	|---|---|---|
398	| Excel 格式不统一 | 解析失败率高 | 提供模板下载；解析时容错处理；预览环节人工审核 |
399	| 选手姓名重复 | 匹配错误 | 精确匹配 + 预览时标记未匹配行；管理员人工确认 |
400	| 积分规则变更 | 已生成积分需重算 | 提供撤回发布功能；撤回后可重新生成 |
401	| 单管理员操作 | 无并发冲突控制 | MVP 阶段管理员人数少（1-3 人），暂不做乐观锁 |
402	| 数据量增长 | 排行榜查询变慢 | MVP 数据量小（<5000 条），动态查询可满足；后续可加物化视图 |
403	| H5 兼容性 | 部分老旧浏览器不支持 | 目标浏览器：iOS Safari 14+、Android Chrome 80+、微信内置浏览器 |
404	| 无备份机制 | 数据丢失风险 | MVP 阶段手动定期备份 PostgreSQL；后续接入自动备份 |
405	
406	---
407	
408	## 14. 术语表
409	
410	| 术语 | 含义 |
411	|---|---|
412	| THA | 清华校友网球协会（Tsinghua Alumni Tennis Association） |
413	| 赛季 | 年度积分统计周期（如 2026-04 至 2027-04） |
414	| 单项双打赛 | 两人一组的双打比赛 |
415	| 团体赛 | 以团队为单位参赛，积分按队员分摊 |
416	| 代表队赛事 | 代表学校/协会参加的外部赛事 |
417	| 积分来源 | individual_event / team_share / travel_bonus / representative_team / organizer_bonus / donation_bonus |
418	| 赛事级别 | THA1000 / THA800 / THA500 / THA200 / THA_S / THA_A / THA_B |
419
```
</details></tool-use>

5	本目录承载 THA 年度赛事积分系统的全部前端实现，包括：
6	
7	- 用户端（H5）：`frontend/user/` — 面向校友的排行榜展示
8	- 管理端（Web）：`frontend/admin/` — 面向管理员的后台管理系统

43	## 页面实现范围
